data.title: Hoag Classic in Newport Beach announced Tyler Braden as headliner for Sunset Celebration, 3rd annual event.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Newport Beach, California, the Hoag Classic, a prestigious PGA TOUR Champions event in Orange County, revealed that country music sensation Tyler Braden will be the main act at the upcoming third annual Hoag Classic Sunset Celebration & Concert at VEA Newport Beach.

data.title: Intuitive Surgical's stock plunges after weak 2026 growth forecast despite crushing Q4 expectations.
data.description: Intuitive Surgical saw a significant drop in stock prices on Wednesday following a disappointing outlook for procedure growth in 2026. Despite surpassing fourth-quarter forecasts, the company experienced a sharp decline in share value.

data.title: Trip.com stock plunges due to China antitrust probe. Online travel leader under investigation by regulators.
data.description: The stock of Trip.com plummeted following the disclosure that the travel company is under investigation by antitrust regulators in China. The leading online travel company in China, Trip.com, experienced a significant drop in its stock value due to the antitrust probe.

data.title: Logitech focusing on videoconferencing and gaming gear for growth in 2026, despite stock slump.
data.description: Logitech, a prominent manufacturer of computer peripherals, has set its sights on three significant prospects for the year 2026. Despite this, the company's stock has been experiencing a decline. The key areas of focus for Logitech include videoconferencing and gaming gear, representing lucrative opportunities for growth and development in the coming years.

data.title: Bitcoin price surged on CPI report. Senate to debate Clarity Act. CleanSpark rising on AI expansion plans.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged following the release of a Consumer Price Index report, reaching new highs. The Senate is scheduled to discuss the Clarity Act in a markup hearing, sparking investor interest. CleanSpark experienced a significant increase in value due to its expansion in artificial intelligence technology. Additionally, a Bitcoin mining company saw a surge in stock value after announcing plans for a new data center. This news underscores the growing influence of cryptocurrency and emerging technologies in the financial market.

data.title: AppLovin stock receives new buy rating as 'dominant' mobile gaming ad tech platform from analysts.
data.description: Analysts from Evercore ISI stated on Wednesday that there is still considerable potential for growth in AppLovin stock, following a significant surge last year. The mobile gaming ad tech platform has received a new buy rating, with analysts describing it as a dominant player in the industry. This assessment comes after a period of notable success for the company.

data.title: SoundHound AI stock struggles as sales growth slows, facing losses, stuck in a slump post Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: SoundHound AI is currently grappling with a challenging situation, as the voice AI technology company is experiencing a slowdown in sales growth along with ongoing losses. The stock performance of SoundHound has been lackluster, causing concern among investors. This decline in sales growth is a significant setback for the company as it strives to achieve profitability. SoundHound's stock has been struggling to gain momentum amidst these challenges. The company's financial difficulties are reflected in their continuing losses, which have contributed to the current downtrend in their stock performance. This situation has attracted attention in the business and investment community, with many closely monitoring the company's progress and financial results in the coming quarters to assess its future prospects.

data.title: Supreme Court delay on tariff ruling leaves retailers waiting, potentially worsening $2 trillion budget deficit.
data.description: An invalidated ruling on tariffs is expected to further increase the already more than $2 trillion budget deficit. The Supreme Court decision on tariffs is not expected to be announced today, causing anticipation among several retailers.

data.title: Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Citi report on 2nd day of bank earnings, shares slide on mixed results.
data.description: On a busy day for bank earnings reports, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, and Citi disclosed their financial statements. However, shares of these major banks experienced a decline due to mixed results. The downward trend in stock prices is notable amidst the recent releases.

data.title: Silver jumps to fresh records at $92 per ounce amid easing inflation data and mounting political pressure on monetary policy. Silver up 200% over the past year, driven by safe-haven flows and Fed policy concerns.
data.description: Silver surged past $92 per ounce, a record high, driven by easing inflation data and growing political pressure on monetary policy. The move comes amid expectations of Federal Reserve interest rate cuts later this year. U.S. retail sales exceeded expectations, reflecting strong consumer demand. Silver's rally, up 200% in the past year, is also attributed to safe-haven flows as the Department of Justice launched a criminal investigation against Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Powell believes the probe is a pretext for pushing lower rates. The rally may also be linked to a Federal Reserve hindered by rising debt. The rare macro backdrop features easing policy expectations alongside economic strength.
